Bash(P="C:/Users/ets1wz/AppData/Local/npm-cache/_npx/86170c4cd1c5da32/node_modules/@playwright/mcp"; echo "=== version ==="; python -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\(r'$P/package.json'\)\);print\('version',d.get\('version'\)\);print\('bin',d.get\('bin'\)\);print\('deps',json.dumps\(d.get\('dependencies'\),indent=2\)\);print\('scripts',json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts'\),indent=2\)\)"; echo "=== bundled playwright version ==="; find "$P/../.." -maxdepth 3 -path "*playwright-core/package.json" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs -I{} python -c "import json,sys;print\('playwright-core',json.load\(open\('{}'\)\).get\('version'\)\)" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== grep browser-install hints in dist ==="; grep -roiE "playwright install[a-z --]*|_playwrightBrowsersPath|install the browser|npx playwright install [a-z]+" "$P/lib" "$P/index.js" "$P/cli.js" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20)
